reportedIssues: Content is horizontally clipped on the right side. The top category tab shows only part of 'Hot Games', and the third column of game cards is cut off throughout the page.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, hiding parts of the lower game cards.
The hero carousel right arrow is very close to the screen edge and appears partially cramped against the banner boundary.
The top horizontal category navigation shows a partially visible tab without a clear scroll cue, which can look broken rather than intentionally scrollable.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a category highlight/selection problem; they all focus on layout clipping, overlap, spacing, or scroll visibility issues.
